optimizations.title: Bundle Size Optimization
optimizations.description: JavaScript bundle is large. Consider further code splitting.
actions: Implement dynamic imports for route-based code splitting
Use React.lazy() for component-level lazy loading
Implement tree shaking for better dead code elimination

optimizations.title: Large Chunk: react
actions: Split react chunk into smaller modules
Use dynamic imports for non-critical features

optimizations.title: Core Web Vitals Optimization
optimizations.description: Implement Core Web Vitals monitoring and optimization
actions: Add LCP optimization with image preloading
Implement CLS prevention with proper image dimensions
Optimize FCP with critical CSS inlining
Add INP monitoring for interaction responsiveness

optimizations.title: SEO Enhancement
actions: Add structured data for better rich snippets
Implement proper meta tags for all pages
Add canonical URLs and sitemap optimization

optimizations.title: Accessibility Improvements
actions: Add proper ARIA labels and landmarks
